content.text:
All 8 tests pass, including "should support negative coordinates". The existing implementation uses a sparse representation (list of live cell coordinates) with `Set<string>` keys and a `Map<string, Cell>` for candidates, which is naturally coordinate-agnostic — negative coordinates work without any special handling.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: No code changes needed. The existing sparse-coordinate design (string keys via `${x},${y}`) inherently supports negative coordinates.
- Result: All 8 tests pass.
- Approach: Minimal — the test passes against the existing implementation because the coordinate model is already general (no array-index assumptions, no non-negative constraint). Adding any code would be over-implementation.
